calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-17-2014 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE CYNTHIA M. LEE; Clerk KCox; Proceedings not reported. (610)

Ntc Of Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Dec-03-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Kevin Sullivan, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, JULIE RESLER.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) AKIWANDE MCCORMACK, JEGAN LOUM.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1- 10 dismissed without prejudice.
Plaintiff Julie Resler sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $67,000.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $36,900.00
Attorney's Fees: $15,000.00
Costs: $4,212.78
Total Judgment in the amount of $123,112.78
Judgment signed in open court.

Ntc Of Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-15-2013 Continued To Dec-03-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

Dept. 514, Judge: Newton Lam, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Kevin M. Sullivan, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Julie Resner.
Court ordered hearing continued to 12/3/2013 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514.
Counsel for Petitioner to file further documentation for Default Prove Up.

MINI MINUTES:
